---
title: "Route Map"
format: html
---

We are working on several different possible routes. Three of the broad options are detailed in the interactive map below. Our preferred option is to follow the old railway line (dashed blue). Any of the routes are subject to change with feasibility, practicality, cost and land owner consent all factors in what is finally built. 

Click on any route to see more details. The dashed lines are possible routes and solid lines are existing cycle paths. 

```{=html}
<link rel="stylesheet" href="https://unpkg.com/leaflet@1.9.4/dist/leaflet.css" />
<script src="https://unpkg.com/leaflet@1.9.4/dist/leaflet.js"></script>

<div id="cyclemap" style="height: 600px; width: 100%; border-radius: 8px;"></div>

<script>
  const OS_API_KEY = "197gTm9mrdeMwpyi3gReX4Qvon0Pclht";

  // dashArray options:
  //   null        → solid line
  //   "8, 8"      → evenly dashed
  //   "15, 10"    → long dash
  //   "2, 8"      → dotted
  const paths = [
    {
      name: "Option A – Old Railway Line: 6.7 km (Preferred)",
      desc: "Following the route of the former Tayport Branch Line. Largely flat, minimal road crossings and minimal impact on fields compared to other routes and likely the least expensive to construct as it's mostly already a path on an old railway line.",
      color: "#2a7ae2",
      dashArray: "8, 8",
      coords: [
        [56.382570449907860, -2.887055452463500],
        [56.389524357176917, -2.880870561883650],
        [56.391093876398507, -2.879926636216222],
        [56.392496948616028, -2.879298205090684],
        [56.413758082394040, -2.871509100321130],
        [56.413805566457512, -2.871571017615425],
        [56.414206938841893, -2.867607887551803],
        [56.417588624911772, -2.867530392971720],
        [56.418391035339070, -2.868540777286625],
        [56.418849526218743, -2.869913855446357],
        [56.421758189729388, -2.869318170963167],
        [56.423341699512029, -2.870090275732207],
        [56.423676600146457, -2.869563184207015],
        [56.423800153585887, -2.869547092236414],
        [56.430725606425703, -2.869055188680505],
        [56.433158971610467, -2.868889693840758],
        [56.435165514087508, -2.869179299143695],
        [56.435414730420298, -2.869077507941554],
        [56.437079361712748, -2.869619100790727]
      ]
    },
      {
      name: "Option C – Tentsmuir Route: 8.9 km",
      desc: "An alternative route suggested by stakeholders. This route has the same issues as Option B and is 2.2 km longer than the railway option. A large portion of this route would follow an existing haul road in Tentsmuir, however, the start of the route is prone to flooding that would likely require major works to construct a raised road.",
      color: "#BA55D3",
      dashArray: "8, 8",
    coords: [
      [56.382566098322592, -2.887070944118728],
      [56.381709379911548, -2.885493343664496],
      [56.381750806420371, -2.884328120048191],
      [56.382243120886812, -2.882967517777271],
      [56.383940896359647, -2.880120126661430],
      [56.389262434194848, -2.874977983343921],
      [56.389895837738187, -2.874568176481317],
      [56.391799153715191, -2.874981064140360],
      [56.392206782434997, -2.874600065988352],
      [56.393260811499637, -2.870957108181736],
      [56.397661130168878, -2.864956231949610],
      [56.399352050589478, -2.864963831166646],
      [56.401372524750407, -2.854401537243597],
      [56.402357469501567, -2.852168645507148],
      [56.403055496644313, -2.848486795156927],
      [56.417921437135490, -2.850044100868223],
      [56.418304687301720, -2.850351971277280],
      [56.425119588559042, -2.849602588859320],
      [56.426025245917693, -2.849060047268457],
      [56.426405756130897, -2.849080629055981],
      [56.428557678330122, -2.850682235936850],
      [56.429237857107047, -2.850894043243933],
      [56.429440667811967, -2.850568008892387],
      [56.436183797167168, -2.856535881592206],
      [56.437329505719283, -2.857088351627936],
      [56.437692042626551, -2.856234208841266],
      [56.437913754000299, -2.856621088636077],
      [56.439157962927268, -2.857582387673618],
      [56.439283691954479, -2.859451856121034],
      [56.439190716052700, -2.860376630610241],
      [56.439250925438699, -2.861460270616838],
      [56.439355350147729, -2.861937520274571],
      [56.439333360004049, -2.862245740155969],
      [56.439432265211082, -2.863508466002394],
      [56.439630105114993, -2.864552476106721],
      [56.439930567439703, -2.865275174189519],
      [56.440275620682250, -2.865859783071453],
      [56.441189996149603, -2.869580033783005],
      [56.441409800082212, -2.870236117083413],
      [56.441479798738619, -2.871077185886636]
    ]
    },
    {
      name: "Option B – Tentsmuir Route: 8.0 km",
      desc: "An alternative route running through the inside of Tentsmuir and then joining the back road to Leuchars. This route avoids private land but would require the road to be widened at several points, has more ascent and descent and is less direct.",
      color: "#e27a2a",
      dashArray: "8, 8",
      coords: [
        [56.441502281331701, -2.871111208758136],
        [56.435395585344722, -2.869062745057350],
        [56.435149957978389, -2.869213838933121],
        [56.433365961238621, -2.868901674453336],
        [56.432869496587607, -2.868570310710691],
        [56.432739717263019, -2.868091036800212],
        [56.427811660454744, -2.865290326152024],
        [56.427153711232471, -2.863213906433277],
        [56.426095984224148, -2.861928572008283],
        [56.425836920532461, -2.861303721656523],
        [56.425595828574487, -2.861062529787026],
        [56.424739823935752, -2.860635635300596],
        [56.423338689848180, -2.860169182105916],
        [56.422999696336838, -2.859890451383244],
        [56.422811206107028, -2.859300241605522],
        [56.422605270071273, -2.858125431222307],
        [56.422388718611117, -2.858031121571388],
        [56.419894293201153, -2.858008939314916],
        [56.418357443186423, -2.857958430420380],
        [56.417783613762367, -2.857281253606666],
        [56.415703658687363, -2.856943418981191],
        [56.407395492061973, -2.856144414819668],
        [56.406364696538049, -2.857474318948360],
        [56.404521843393447, -2.857372280959531],
        [56.403592183001052, -2.857703882737868],
        [56.400942227167533, -2.856976494291072],
        [56.399982444466190, -2.862001026487899],
        [56.399266928074397, -2.865014412599778],
        [56.397631232940277, -2.864988796070460],
        [56.394209645391562, -2.869856960423114],
        [56.393227498537307, -2.871009170695187],
        [56.392202886289802, -2.874596322494187],
        [56.391843871012583, -2.874944217026389],
        [56.390453355761181, -2.874701681645041],
        [56.389887951669017, -2.874582321815021],
        [56.389252421363231, -2.875011631142659],
        [56.383910350972847, -2.880163131007035],
        [56.383238029894699, -2.881386226224631],
        [56.382258828233873, -2.882971738036813],
        [56.381741018487872, -2.884351393408520],
        [56.381714757771093, -2.885455671024089],
        [56.381972129895658, -2.886052147196553],
        [56.382219887701652, -2.886417070561079],
        [56.382553855248901, -2.887045544837600]
      ]
    },
    {
      name: "Existing Dundee to Tayport Route: 7.5 km",
      desc: "The existing cycle path from Dundee to the Larick Center in Tayport is mostly segregated and safe.",
      color: "#2a7ae2",
      dashArray: null,
      coords: [
        [56.459166843215037, -2.963061740791842],
        [56.446950068556923, -2.933316626960011],
        [56.459069652072003, -2.962814130083079],
        [56.452713845774078, -2.947615571530631],
        [56.449157037790748, -2.938918138430956],
        [56.446976184828408, -2.933401734258050],
        [56.447003200814237, -2.933171090954484],
        [56.447051962451653, -2.932993819118472],
        [56.447077160800752, -2.932637376315318],
        [56.447097744467342, -2.932063105153065],
        [56.447461062533051, -2.930750876739409],
        [56.447263444230749, -2.930326604008769],
        [56.447461366932721, -2.929978602791378],
        [56.447682952005572, -2.929775430934684],
        [56.447947249909021, -2.929684230852653],
        [56.448066483866363, -2.929989387901977],
        [56.448134615868540, -2.929977325493989],
        [56.448669280979033, -2.926724586701393],
        [56.449001617730453, -2.924147259049849],
        [56.449581721423939, -2.919865499203268],
        [56.449745232305482, -2.918240237302909],
        [56.449775468546662, -2.917964211621613],
        [56.449990616384873, -2.917942999019973],
        [56.450082040019588, -2.915941518813951],
        [56.449945735811923, -2.915697058912488],
        [56.450329245714620, -2.910959994722989],
        [56.450477964723063, -2.910698049291697],
        [56.451583820366110, -2.904748148773350],
        [56.451916941672039, -2.902442698473326],
        [56.452003128404662, -2.900277373079469],
        [56.452115854108257, -2.897798010990385],
        [56.452214048883711, -2.896738587476437],
        [56.452501410004302, -2.894385981123381],
        [56.452460626584973, -2.891549408466133],
        [56.452302511767932, -2.887915673246466],
        [56.452078248041552, -2.886482990716631],
        [56.451914731372312, -2.886491099062486],
        [56.451755115712302, -2.885088140591956],
        [56.451583161839167, -2.884503954876537],
        [56.451435455779880, -2.883180883214503],
        [56.450920675092043, -2.881327116170754],
        [56.450771276515063, -2.881046813085686],
        [56.450877605602869, -2.880639023809981],
        [56.450666103148961, -2.880159323662458],
        [56.449847806824003, -2.879138769075308],
        [56.449894847242540, -2.879000626021644],
        [56.450033146189462, -2.879099649657068],
        [56.450393326985044, -2.878087225056968],
        [56.450117814161032, -2.877689497218003],
        [56.449622441185539, -2.877280850407950],
        [56.448210163088063, -2.876874676298647],
        [56.446959156545077, -2.875193236813934],
        [56.447123939000527, -2.874267497629114],
        [56.446238394907098, -2.870662670410656],
        [56.446062236389693, -2.870578678672221],
        [56.445903180709109, -2.870475445625321],
        [56.445804544701062, -2.870092762091059],
        [56.445763881942618, -2.869811074489541],
        [56.445395712128061, -2.869644660308955],
        [56.444892046947331, -2.869407011147536],
        [56.444353731480511, -2.869510096801648],
        [56.443452179826970, -2.869834669517982],
        [56.442891976545717, -2.869620933834860],
        [56.442603118669638, -2.869035149885003],
        [56.442253366077537, -2.868940166474986],
        [56.441190511765193, -2.869478444621172],
        [56.441397159049060, -2.871068218636363]
      ]
    },
     {
      name: "Existing Leuchars to St Andrews Route: 8.4 km",
      desc: "The existing cycle path from Leuchars to St Andrews is mostly segregated and safe although improvement and general maintanence are needed in some sections",
      color: "#2a7ae2",
      dashArray: null,
     coords: [
        [56.382471414924687, -2.886966104883455],
        [56.377845446499059, -2.890875966575503],
        [56.377035758343688, -2.891312601833393],
        [56.376266624621913, -2.891420787117984],
        [56.375236920657791, -2.891153677598957],
        [56.374704704360553, -2.890767761423851],
        [56.373786330678954, -2.889925844444232],
        [56.373256503912067, -2.889586971649481],
        [56.372856228184993, -2.889368710194073],
        [56.372341627308302, -2.889243659696765],
        [56.371710973729080, -2.889219684436156],
        [56.371548527217129, -2.889217653913917],
        [56.371021797495850, -2.889453394003751],
        [56.370227985579987, -2.889948347497386],
        [56.370149417948546, -2.890304775463825],
        [56.369888598008643, -2.890503048418005],
        [56.369699354045707, -2.891018090362270],
        [56.369260594746073, -2.890880899629576],
        [56.369102134921860, -2.891058500814091],
        [56.369069034035640, -2.891118116252966],
        [56.368954915923958, -2.891056713042370],
        [56.368850773570678, -2.891043838653339],
        [56.368363409425157, -2.891376146387515],
        [56.368048752477790, -2.891605432135216],
        [56.367596231063793, -2.891750057470239],
        [56.367391019429789, -2.891946119010053],
        [56.366899544023717, -2.891958125684812],
        [56.366636584543272, -2.892020616254677],
        [56.366450927578320, -2.892037342231536],
        [56.366213350150147, -2.891989065688948],
        [56.365765723601051, -2.892024218710153],
        [56.365306098741641, -2.892187111674509],
        [56.365198023484453, -2.892310870162671],
        [56.364519909686720, -2.892519041146870],
        [56.364030915103633, -2.892658142653956],
        [56.363961450207917, -2.892646550562896],
        [56.363436480822038, -2.892504595915926],
        [56.362948325931633, -2.892430474823621],
        [56.362822746081768, -2.892458817478119],
        [56.362357154214813, -2.892398675522271],
        [56.362110083092134, -2.892508467424649],
        [56.361786104593520, -2.892460375794689],
        [56.361684287830997, -2.892370747562258],
        [56.361050104545598, -2.892245580021033],
        [56.360106788228443, -2.891462971775432],
        [56.359927682969357, -2.891201469263732],
        [56.359690240222307, -2.890870110244057],
        [56.359602131564387, -2.890879943477513],
        [56.359480150099543, -2.890641437988332],
        [56.359464086295269, -2.890504466248278],
        [56.359230029607623, -2.889917718319253],
        [56.359059673997521, -2.889874009546861],
        [56.358967130769500, -2.884952766739253],
        [56.358360628436117, -2.882087374933104],
        [56.358272085857642, -2.881878365703021],
        [56.358227561221852, -2.880892341962414],
        [56.358310292137148, -2.879899701988247],
        [56.358530526815983, -2.877666440370632],
        [56.358971625510797, -2.873278523631026],
        [56.358946659806747, -2.868963175886732],
        [56.358760316596282, -2.867346395585942],
        [56.358220495270558, -2.865397780768089],
        [56.358217323464089, -2.865461579309603],
        [56.356176912246319, -2.858175150852852],
        [56.355711290599750, -2.856997813687927],
        [56.355414550758823, -2.856367033622111],
        [56.354681012927713, -2.855239560884434],
        [56.354409217321837, -2.854804091522038],
        [56.354165008102022, -2.854321390709678],
        [56.353986500167757, -2.853722715916621],
        [56.351462113470987, -2.841982571804255],
        [56.351400728407981, -2.841467114354502],
        [56.351190174361520, -2.840855852363283],
        [56.350533176520948, -2.839286353867421],
        [56.350376836559370, -2.838672508403933],
        [56.350073727982917, -2.837111566219087],
        [56.350037411371240, -2.835029874825115],
        [56.349986018228712, -2.834126435449822],
        [56.348989568162843, -2.827854603470304],
        [56.348289813939473, -2.824425048189619],
        [56.348004433166047, -2.822618892699434],
        [56.347488778397071, -2.821027909876624],
        [56.347284576758582, -2.820606180843227],
        [56.347153968289852, -2.820451619520823],
        [56.347074347775830, -2.820294433060387],
        [56.347047793878502, -2.820088938726509],
        [56.346668559177502, -2.819408960458891],
        [56.346554520625709, -2.819202563675954],
        [56.346480065503528, -2.818952302228053],
        [56.346420415974947, -2.818870062621774],
        [56.345977124849917, -2.818618912910777],
        [56.345245439711370, -2.815613724552905],
        [56.343678191464562, -2.811915160922144],
        [56.343118125813213, -2.810278158672089],
        [56.342065848961447, -2.808756277824096]
      ]
    }
  ];

  // ── MAP SETUP ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

  const map = L.map("cyclemap").setView([56.4188, -2.855], 12);

  L.tileLayer(
    `https://api.os.uk/maps/raster/v1/zxy/Outdoor_3857/{z}/{x}/{y}.png?key=${OS_API_KEY}`,
    {
      maxZoom: 20,
      attribution: '© <a href="https://www.ordnancesurvey.co.uk/">Ordnance Survey</a>'
    }
  ).addTo(map);

  // ── DRAW PATHS ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

  const NORMAL_WEIGHT    = 5;
  const HIGHLIGHT_WEIGHT = 9;
  const HIGHLIGHT_COLOR  = "#ffdd00";

  let activePolyline = null;

  paths.forEach(path => {
    const polyline = L.polyline(path.coords, {
      color:     path.color,
      weight:    NORMAL_WEIGHT,
      opacity:   0.85,
      dashArray: path.dashArray   // null = solid, "8, 8" = dashed, etc.
    }).addTo(map);

    polyline.on("click", function (e) {
      if (activePolyline && activePolyline !== polyline) {
        activePolyline.setStyle({
          color:     activePolyline._originalColor,
          dashArray: activePolyline._originalDash,
          weight:    NORMAL_WEIGHT
        });
      }

      // Store originals so we can restore them on popup close
      polyline._originalColor = path.color;
      polyline._originalDash  = path.dashArray;

      polyline.setStyle({
        color:     HIGHLIGHT_COLOR,
        weight:    HIGHLIGHT_WEIGHT,
        dashArray: null            // always solid when highlighted
      });
      activePolyline = polyline;

      L.popup()
        .setLatLng(e.latlng)
        .setContent(`<strong>${path.name}</strong><br/>${path.desc}`)
        .openOn(map);

      L.DomEvent.stopPropagation(e);
    });

    map.on("popupclose", function () {
      if (activePolyline) {
        activePolyline.setStyle({
          color:     activePolyline._originalColor,
          dashArray: activePolyline._originalDash,
          weight:    NORMAL_WEIGHT
        });
        activePolyline = null;
      }
    });
  });
</script>
```

### Active travel strategy

The Tayport Cycle Link forms part of Fife Council's broader Active Travel Strategy connecting Fife's towns and villages with safe cycle routes. You can find more information about the Active Travel Strategy on the Fife Council website.

![](./images/active_travel_map.png){.rounded-img}

::: {.centertext style="text-align: center;"}
_Map of Fife Council's Active Travel Strategy showing proposed cycle routes in North East Fife_
:::
